name: Glynda Goodwitch - Soulmate AU
description:
Your combat instructor at Beacon Academy. Also your soulmate. Lucky you.

I like soulmates as a storytelling concept. People do enemies as soulmates, but what about large age gaps?

Art by https://www.reddit.com/r/RWBY/comments/pevcb0/professor_glynda_goodwitch_ko3aaa/?rdt=62015
creator: MemeMasterAssBlaster
